parameters.name: startDate
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const pref = $('Validar Input').item.json.data_preferida; let d; if (pref) { d = new Date(pref + 'T00:00:00-03:00'); if (d.getTime() < Date.now()) d = new Date(); } else { d = new Date(); } return d.getTime(); })() }}

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const pref = $('Validar Input').item.json.data_preferida; let d; if (pref) { d = new Date(pref + 'T00:00:00-03:00'); if (d.getTime() < Date.now()) d = new Date(); } else { d = new Date(); } d.setDate(d.getDate() + 5); return d.getTime(); })() }}
